name: shorten-url
title: Shorten URL
description: Select a URL anywhere, hit a hotkey — shortened link lands in your clipboard via Shlink
author: donovanhaney

commands.name: shorten-url
commands.title: Shorten URL
commands.description: Shorten the selected URL and copy to clipboard

commands.name: shorten-url-replace
commands.title: Shorten URL & Replace
commands.description: Shorten the selected URL and replace it in-place

preferences.name: shlinkApiKey
preferences.title: Shlink API Key
preferences.description: API key generated via shlink api-key:generate

preferences.name: customSchemes
preferences.title: Custom URL Schemes
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of app URL schemes to recognize (e.g. obsidian, slack, zoom)
preferences.default: obsidian, raycast, slack, zoom, notion, spotify, vscode, msteams, tg, onepassword
